statusLine.command: input=$(cat); model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name'); ccdata=$(ccusage blocks --json 2>/dev/null | jq -r '.blocks[] | select(.isActive == true) | "Session: \((.totalTokens / 17213778 * 100) | floor)% used | Resets: \(.projection.remainingMinutes / 60 | floor)h \(.projection.remainingMinutes % 60)m | $\((.burnRate.costPerHour * 100 | round) / 100)/hr"' 2>/dev/null || echo 'Session: --'); printf "%s | %s" "$model" "$ccdata"

hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.uri' | sed 's|^file://||' | xargs -I {} bash -c 'if command -v pycharm &> /dev/null; then pycharm --line 1 "{}"; elif command -v idea &> /dev/null; then idea --line 1 "{}"; elif command -v code &> /dev/null; then code "{}"; elif command -v cursor &> /dev/null; then cursor "{}"; fi' && sleep 0.5
